# Talon

> AI-Native Multi-Model Data Engine
> 9 engines in one binary: SQL · KV · TimeSeries · MQ · Vector · FTS · GEO · Graph · AI
> Single binary, zero dependencies, embedded + server dual-mode

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://docs.talon.dev/guide/getting-started): Quick start guide
- [SQL Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/sql): Relational DB with window functions, JOINs, UPSERT
- [KV Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/kv): Redis-compatible key-value with TTL
- [TimeSeries Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/timeseries): Time-series with downsampling
- [MessageQueue Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/message-queue): MQ with consumer groups, DLQ
- [Vector Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/vector): HNSW ANN search with recommend/discover
- [FTS Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/full-text-search): BM25 + ES-compatible queries
- [GEO Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/geo): Geohash spatial indexing
- [Graph Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/graph): Property graph with BFS/DFS/PageRank
- [AI Engine](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/ai): Session/Context/Memory/RAG/Agent/Trace
- [Fusion Queries](https://docs.talon.dev/engines/fusion-queries): Cross-engine combinations
- [Full API Reference](https://docs.talon.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete API signatures
